The '''93-B Light Hover''', commonly referred to as the '''93-B''', was a [[hovercraft]] built by the [[Aratech Repulsor Company/Legends|Aratech Repulsor Company]].

==Characteristics==
Like all [[hovercraft]] the 93-B differed from [[Repulsorcraft/Legends|repulsorcraft]] in that it rode on a cushion of air, which was created by lift engines and contained within a flexible skirt. While not as fast or maneuverable, hovercraft could handle environments which were hazardous to repulsorlift use.<ref name="GOR" />

The 93-B was used by [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]'s megacorporations and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] to transport personnel and supplies. A two-man crew operated the craft (although a single [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] could manage on their own) in a command compartment separate from the passenger area. Both were independently sealed and pressurized so that a breach in one compartment did not endanger the other.<ref name="GOR" />

The hovercraft's skirt was reinforced with thin plates of [[Duralumin/Legends|duralumin]], which not only prevented normal tearing but made it resistant to [[Weapon/Legends|weapons]] fire. However the 93-B was not meant for actual combat, and while theoretically it could mount weaponry installing the necessary wiring to control it threatened the integrity of the compartments.<ref name="GOR" />
